title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.180 - Parcels, set off to the parties, to be held and enjoyed by them, how
text:
528.180.  Parcels, set off to the parties, to be held and enjoyed by them, how. — If partition be made according to such judgment, and the report of the commissioners, as herein directed, be confirmed, the parcel so set off to several parties shall thereafter be held and enjoyed by them, in like portions and in the same estate as they before had in the whole.
(RSMo 1939 § 1726) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1562; 1919 § 2010; 1909 § 2574
